title: Integrate win probability into The Lab dashboard
description: Add win probability visualization to The Lab. Show historical match replays with win probability curve overlaid on key moments (wickets, sixes, milestones). Export probability data as JS for client-side rendering.
deferred_reason: Sprint 5 close-out: Blocked by TKT-207 (win prob model training, Ime Udoka). Visualization cannot proceed without trained model output. Deferred to Sprint 6.

2026-02-28T00:00:00Z.detail: Deferred to Sprint 6. Blocked by TKT-207 (ML model). Once Ime Udoka delivers the trained model, KDB builds the visualization layer. Sprint 6 P1.
